name: Simple Sausage Balls
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Grated Colby or Mild Cheddar
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the sausage, cheese, and biscuit mix in a large bowl.
2. Roll into about 1-inch balls.
3. Place on a shallow baking pan (with sides to catch grease).
4. Bake at 350°F until done. Both cooked and uncooked balls may be frozen.
